title: 1 step DFU - Content of Software Update tab with available update for Earbuds and Charge Case on FW 5038
scenario: Software Update tab shows only Earbuds update when Charge Case is on firmware 5038 (unsupported for 1-step DFU) on Osprey EB
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with Osprey Earbuds connected on a lower firmware version (with an available update) and the Charge Case on firmware version 5038.
2. Navigate to Device Settings → Software Update.
3. Observe the Software Update tab content.
expected: Only the Earbuds update is shown. The Charge Case update is not displayed because version 5038 does not support 1-step DFU. Additionally, when the device is on version 5038, a case toast for the device is present with the same pattern as for Tern (after app restart, for a specific number of times, and after earbuds DFU).
